texto: But the most extraordinary is this relationship with Jesus. It’s not mass produced - one size fits all. No, it’s one to one, customized to fit the shape of who you have been, what you have done and where you want to be in the future. He’s taken that time to tune into me, into my patterns and my past.
explicacao: Citação de Emily Silver sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “But the most extraordinary is this relationship with Jesus. It’s not mass produced - one size fit…” articula tempo, jesus, realtionship em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como realtionship.
